name: Khoj
description: AI personal assistant with vector search, document indexing, cloud sync, and multi-platform support.
tagline: Self-hosted AI assistant with document indexing
crossMachineDetail: Has cloud sync and self-hosted server mode
contextInjectionDetail: Agent calls MCP tools or Khoj's API to search and retrieve indexed documents
networkDetail: Can self-host locally or use Khoj's cloud service with sync
